name: monsterbox
description: MonsterBox 5.5 - Animatronic Control System with Conversation Mode, Poses, Random Poses on Boot, and Hardened Orchestration

scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:ui:fast: PW_WORKERS=${PW_WORKERS:-4} MB_TEST_MODE=1 MB_NO_MCP=1 PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:shard1of2: PW_SHARD=1/2 MB_TEST_MODE=1 MB_NO_MCP=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:shard2of2: PW_SHARD=2/2 MB_TEST_MODE=1 MB_NO_MCP=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:smoke: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/sanity.spec.js tests/playwright/no-400s.spec.js tests/playwright/no-localhost-links.spec.js tests/ui/browser.spec.js
scripts.test:ui:core: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/navigation-and-character-persistence.spec.js tests/playwright/orchestration-ui.spec.js tests/playwright/conversation-live-unified.spec.js
scripts.test:ui:audio: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/setup-audio*.spec.js tests/playwright/audio-system-validation.spec.js
scripts.test:ui:calibration: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/calibration-*.spec.js tests/playwright/simple-calibration.spec.ts
scripts.test:ui:goblin: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/goblin-*.spec.js
scripts.test:ui:scenes: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/scene-step-play.spec.js tests/playwright/e2e-comprehensive-characters.spec.js
scripts.test:ui:ai: PW_CLEAN_SERVER=1 MB_TEST_MODE=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/ai-settings*.spec.js tests/playwright/stt-*.spec.js
scripts.test:conversation: MB_E2E=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/playwright/conversation-*.spec.js tests/playwright/monster-features.spec.js --project=firefox
scripts.test:all: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:unit && npm run test:ui && npm run test:conversation
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e

author: MonsterBox Team
